headline: Here's Why You Should Add DexCom Stock to Your Portfolio Now
summary: DexCom's expanding CGM market, G7 rollout, and global growth momentum position it for gains, despite pricing pressure and near-term margin risks.

headline: 3 Reasons Investors Love DexCom (DXCM)
summary: Over the last six months, DexCom’s shares have sunk to $62.07, producing a disappointing 6.4% loss - a stark contrast to the S&P 500’s 5.1% gain. This may have investors wondering how to approach the situation.

headline: Abbott trims 2026 profit forecast on Exact deal hit, shares fall
summary: Abbott cut its full-year profit forecast on Thursday due to a 20 cent-per-share hit from its recent $23 billion acquisition of cancer test maker Exact Sciences, sending its shares down more than 4%...
